html:div.html:p: This library defines decision support logic for the IMMZ.D2.DT.Varicella.2 doses decision table in the Immunization CPG

Client is due for varicella vaccination
Client is due for varicella vaccination Guidance
Varicella immunization schedule is complete Guidance
